/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -pie --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/euxis-core-cpp_tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/euxis-core-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_resilience.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-core-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_router.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-core-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_swarm.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-core-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_ws_client.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-core-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_topology_grid.cpp.o" -o euxis-core-cpp_tests  libeuxis-core-cpp.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 ../euxis-crypto-cpp/libeuxis-crypto-cpp.a /usr/lib/libsodium.so ../euxis-metrics-cpp/libeuxis-metrics-cpp.a ../_deps/ixwebsocket-build/libixwebsocket.a /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libspdlog.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
